Name: Alex Thorne
Feedback: The DApp made registering our wind project incredibly straightforward. The integration with Freighter was smooth, and minting our carbon credit tokens (CCT) happened instantly once the auditor verified our generation metrics.

Name: Elena Rostova
Feedback: Excellent smart contract architecture. Being able to push data metrics on-chain as a verified auditor allows for complete transparency. No more manual excel sheets or double-counting risks.

Name: Marcus Chen
Feedback: Impressive transaction speeds on Stellar testnet. The SVG comparison chart is highly interactive and useful for viewing verified output versus minted credits. A search filter for projects would make it perfect.

Name: Sarah Jenkins
Feedback: I love the idea that carbon credits are dynamically backed by actual solar/wind output. The live ledger streaming is very transparent and shows exactly what is happening in real-time.

Name: David Kim
Feedback: Verified the Cargo test integration flow. The cross-contract call from CarbonRegistry to CarbonAsset is secure and uses proper auth requirements. Solid technical foundation.

Name: Sophia Martinez
Feedback: Tested Freighter wallet connection and XLM transfer on the dashboard. Loading states are informative and Freighter error messages are caught nicely. UX is polished and very professional.

Name: Liam O'Connor
Feedback: A textbook implementation of SEP-41 standard tokens for specialized carbon assets. The codebase is clean, well-structured, and modular. Deploy script works flawlessly on testnet.

Name: Amina Yusuf
Feedback: Direct Oracle verification for clean energy generation metrics is the future of ESG compliance. Reduces reporting overhead from weeks to seconds. Looking forward to mainnet.

Name: Yukio Tanaka
Feedback: By eliminating greenwashing through automated mathematical mint limits, this contract resolves the biggest credibility crisis in the offset markets today. Exceptionally useful product.

Name: Clara Dupont
Feedback: Beautiful UI design and outstanding UX. The dashboard gives clear indicators of total verified data vs minted credits. Stellar's low transaction fees make micro-offsets viable.

Name: Robert Miller
Feedback: Onboarding was fast. Using StellarWalletsKit allows us to connect multiple wallets easily. I would suggest adding support for Albedo wallet in the future.

Name: Fatima Al-Sayed
Feedback: The role-based panels are outstanding. It clearly separates what an auditor can do from what a project owner can do. Smart contract authorization check works great.

Name: James Wilson
Feedback: The Next.js integration with the Soroban RPC is very clean. Polling the RPC events works well for a simulated feed, though WebSockets or a custom indexer would improve scalability.

Name: Emma Watson
Feedback: This makes carbon credit verification democratic. Small solar installations can register as projects and get credited automatically. Really neat!

Name: Chen Wei
Feedback: Successfully deployed and tested. I liked the detailed transaction feed. Very useful for auditing historical project mints.

Name: Lucas Silva
Feedback: Excellent project. The double-counting problem is a major hurdle in forest conservation carbon credits. Bringing automated sensor data on-chain is the ultimate solution.

Name: Olivia Taylor
Feedback: Very easy to purchase credits. The transaction copy buttons and explorer links are super helpful to verify that the carbon asset token transfer actually occurred on-chain.

Name: Daniel Green
Feedback: The custom rust contract wasm build is optimized. Checked the contract size and it is well within limits. Good job on keeping dependencies minimal.

Name: Amara Diallo
Feedback: Pushed telemetry data for three projects successfully. The contract validation checks successfully rejected a call when I tried to push data using a non-auditor wallet.

Name: William Davis
Feedback: The Dark Mode is sleek! Product metrics are visible and easy to read. The SVG analytics graph is excellent for quick investor reports.

Name: Priya Nair
Feedback: Great experience. The onboarding tutorial explained exactly how to get testnet XLM and set up the Freighter wallet. Made the initial setup very smooth.

Name: Hans Schmidt
Feedback: Mathematically consistent. The smart contract ensures that minted credits can never exceed the verified telemetry data reported by the auditor. Very secure.

Name: Chloe Lefevre
Feedback: Very smooth interface. The transaction helper tools (like Return to Sender and Repeat Transfer) are excellent additions for user testing and testing fund movements.

Name: Gabriel Garcia
Feedback: Stellar's low fees and instant confirmation make this extremely cost-effective. We can mint credits weekly instead of waiting for yearly audits.

Name: Zoe Jenkins
Feedback: The live event tracking is great. Watching the transactions populate in real-time adds a level of trust that traditional web apps lack.

Name: Nikhil Gupta
Feedback: Solid React hooks and state management using Zustand. The handling of transaction states (Pending -> Confirmed) makes the app feel highly responsive.

Name: Sophia Rossi
Feedback: Highly functional MVP. It resolves all double-spending issues. Future updates should include an automatic email notification when credits are minted.

Name: Aarav Sharma
Feedback: Superb UI styling! The color palette fits the environmental theme perfectly. Wallet connections are stable and don't drop on page refresh.

Name: Isabella Cruz
Feedback: The registry guarantees provenance. Showing the auditor's signature alongside the project mint transaction is key for institutional ESG buyers.

Name: Ji-Won Park
Feedback: Verification transaction takes less than 3 seconds on testnet. The detailed Horizon result codes mapping helped me debug an out-of-funds error instantly.

Name: Thomas Mueller
Feedback: Successfully registered our Alpine Hydro project. The SEP-41 compliant CCT tokens are already showing in our wallet balance on the dashboard. Flawless.

Name: Emily Brown
Feedback: The tutorial page was extremely useful for our field staff. It explained the blockchain concepts simply. A translation into Spanish/French would be great next.

Name: Arthur Pendragon
Feedback: Stellar Carbon Registry is a game-changer. The cross-contract client logic ensures that our credits are minted directly to our wallet, eliminating middleman fees.

Name: Maya Lin
Feedback: Clear, clean, and fast. I bought 100 CCT tokens and verified the transaction hash in under 5 seconds. Very impressed by the UX.

Name: Sven Johansson
Feedback: freighter API is well integrated. App stability is solid; tested on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari with zero UI breakage. Excellent frontend work.

Name: Fatoumata Diallo
Feedback: Highly secure access control. Only our whitelisted auditor key can post telemetry data. Tried pushing data from an owner key and the contract correctly blocked it.

Name: Connor McDavid
Feedback: The automatic calculation of mintable credits from telemetry data reduces human error. Excellent UI representation of the smart contract constraints.

Name: Elena Petrova
Feedback: The verification proof system is robust. The CSV exports allow us to pull clean datasets for regulatory compliance reporting easily. Highly satisfied.

Name: Ali Hassan
Feedback: Tested with 10,000 kWh telemetry input. Minted 10,000 CCT tokens on testnet. The dashboard showed the updated balance immediately. Very reliable.

Name: Laura Bennett
Feedback: The dark/light theme switch works perfectly and keeps my preference. The copy-button for transaction hashes saves a lot of manual highlighting effort.

Name: Rajesh Kumar
Feedback: Very easy to track project state. The comparison chart between verified energy and minted tokens makes auditing extremely visual and fast.

Name: Anna Kovacs
Feedback: The live transactions feed helper buttons (like repeat transfer) made testing our distribution scenarios extremely simple. Great developer considerations.

Name: Tariq Mahmood
Feedback: No issues connected to Stellar testnet. Pushed multiple projects and minted assets without a single fail. Very stable build.

Name: Sofia Ivanova
Feedback: The auditor validation checks on-chain are fast. The transaction feed error mapping saved me when I forgot to fund my testnet auditor account.

Name: Kenji Sato
Feedback: Clean dashboard design. The vercel analytics support ensures high responsiveness. Tested page load speeds and it is sub-second. Exceptional.

Name: Nia Long
Feedback: Excellent tool for community-driven solar grids. They can easily demonstrate their ecological impact directly on the ledger. Highly recommend.

Name: Mateo Fernandez
Feedback: freighter is the standard wallet for Stellar and it fits perfectly here. The smart contract methods are well-documented on the tutorial tab.

Name: Leila Haddad
Feedback: I purchased CCT tokens to offset my office emissions. The transaction feed is transparent and shows the exact timestamp and public key. 10/10.

Name: David Smith
Feedback: Verified that the SEP-41 standard requirements are met. The smart contract source code is extremely readable and cleanly divided. Excellent repository setup.

Name: Yasmine Belkacem
Feedback: The contract handles division and decimal precision correctly for carbon credit weights. Very impressive development work.

Name: Oliver Smith
Feedback: Highly interactive dashboard. The UI feedback when transaction is pending vs when it is confirmed is very satisfying. Highly polished product.

Name: Maria Santos
Feedback: This resolves transparency issues for international carbon offset buyers. They can audit the sensor telemetry data on-chain. Solid Level 5 delivery!
